EmailTemplate.name: ARRH - Screening Pack Invite
EmailTemplate.subject: Thank you for applying with Alliance Rural & Remote Health!
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
THANKS FOR APPLYING — WE'D LOVE TO GET TO KNOW YOU A LITTLE BETTER.
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
Thank you for applying with Alliance Rural & Remote Health. In order to match you with contracts that plays on your skills and experience, we need a few more details from you. Follow the link below and let us know your skills and when would be a good time for us to call you and discuss your application.
OK, LET'S GET STARTED
If you have any questions, please feel free to call our friendly staff on 07 4998 5550.
Kind regards, Your team at Alliance Rural & Remote Health
